title: Robust AI-review verdict parsing
description:
Parse the review verdict so trailing prose after the verdict line no longer records a pass as a failure.

## Background

Both verdict parsers extract the verdict only from the last non-blank line (scripts/ai-review.sh:135-137; contrib/gates/ai-review.sh:105-107), so any reviewer prose after the verdict line flips a pass to a fail. The two copies have drifted and both need the same fix.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-11: a review output whose verdict line is followed by additional prose is recorded as a pass in both parser copies, asserted by a regression test.

## Notes

Touch scripts/ai-review.sh and contrib/gates/ai-review.sh, and add a regression test. Self-contained.
